subcodes.title: Tablet of the Hair 5
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O my God, for Thou didst ordain that the treasure of life lie within the garden of Paradise, wherein Thou didst gather fire and water
subcodes.first_line_orig: فلک الحمد یا الهی مما قدرت کنز الحیوان فی جنه الرضوان و فیه جمعت النار و
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @pain of love; love as veil, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @fire and light; fire and water
